'''鈭歮-y-th''' ('''mayatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:narrate|narrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:narrate|narrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-y-th
|-
! Lemma
| mayatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mayathithi|mayathithi]] || [[word:mayathiji|mayathiji]] || [[word:mayathishi|mayathishi]] || [[word:mayathi|mayathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayathuthuth|mayathuthuth]] || [[word:mayathujuj|mayathujuj]] || [[word:mayathushush|mayathushush]] || [[word:mayath|mayath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayathuthu|mayathuthu]] || [[word:mayathuju|mayathuju]] || [[word:mayathushu|mayathushu]] || [[word:mayathu|mayathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayathufuth|mayathufuth]] || [[word:mayathufuj|mayathufuj]] || [[word:mayathufush|mayathufush]] || [[word:mayathuf|mayathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mayathethe|mayathethe]] || [[word:mayatheje|mayatheje]] || [[word:mayatheshe|mayatheshe]] || [[word:mayathe|mayathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayathothoth|mayathothoth]] || [[word:mayathojoj|mayathojoj]] || [[word:mayathoshosh|mayathoshosh]] || [[word:mayath|mayath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayathotho|mayathotho]] || [[word:mayathojo|mayathojo]] || [[word:mayathosho|mayathosho]] || [[word:mayatho|mayatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayathofoth|mayathofoth]] || [[word:mayathofoj|mayathofoj]] || [[word:mayathofosh|mayathofosh]] || [[word:mayathof|mayathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mayath忙th忙|mayath忙th忙]] || [[word:mayath忙j忙|mayath忙j忙]] || [[word:mayath忙sh忙|mayath忙sh忙]] || [[word:mayath忙|mayath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayathathath|mayathathath]] || [[word:mayathajaj|mayathajaj]] || [[word:mayathashash|mayathashash]] || [[word:mayath|mayath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayathatha|mayathatha]] || [[word:mayathaja|mayathaja]] || [[word:mayathasha|mayathasha]] || [[word:mayatha|mayatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayathafath|mayathafath]] || [[word:mayathafaj|mayathafaj]] || [[word:mayathafash|mayathafash]] || [[word:mayathaf|mayathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mayathasha|mayathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomayathasha|gomayathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimayathasha|gokimayathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mayathn眉sha|mayathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomayathnkn眉sha|gomayathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimayathn眉sha|gokimayathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mayathsh毛sha|mayathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomayathnksh毛sha|gomayathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimayathsh毛sha|gokimayathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mayathrosha|mayathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomayathnkrosha|gomayathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimayathrosha|gokimayathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mayathmusha|mayathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomayathnkmusha|gomayathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimayathmusha|gokimayathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mayathsherasha|mayathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomayathnksherasha|gomayathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimayathsherasha|gokimayathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mayathngasha|mayathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomayathnkngasha|gomayathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimayathngasha|gokimayathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mayathyasha|mayathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomayathnkyasha|gomayathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimayathyasha|gokimayathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mayathyamasha|mayathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomayathnkyamasha|gomayathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimayathyamasha|gokimayathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mayathn眉sh毛sha|mayathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomayathnkn眉sh毛sha|gomayathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimayathn眉sh毛sha|gokimayathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mayathn眉rosha|mayathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomayathnkn眉rosha|gomayathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimayathn眉rosha|gokimayathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayathn眉musha|mayathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomayathnkn眉musha|gomayathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimayathn眉musha|gokimayathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mayathsh毛n眉sha|mayathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomayathnksh毛n眉sha|gomayathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimayathsh毛n眉sha|gokimayathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mayathsh毛rosha|mayathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomayathnksh毛rosha|gomayathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimayathsh毛rosha|gokimayathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayathsh毛musha|mayathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomayathnksh毛musha|gomayathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimayathsh毛musha|gokimayathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mayathron眉sha|mayathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomayathnkron眉sha|gomayathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimayathron眉sha|gokimayathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mayathrosh毛sha|mayathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomayathnkrosh毛sha|gomayathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimayathrosh毛sha|gokimayathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayathromusha|mayathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomayathnkromusha|gomayathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimayathromusha|gokimayathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mayathmun眉sha|mayathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomayathnkmun眉sha|gomayathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimayathmun眉sha|gokimayathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mayathmush毛sha|mayathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomayathnkmush毛sha|gomayathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimayathmush毛sha|gokimayathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mayathmurosha|mayathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomayathnkmurosha|gomayathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimayathmurosha|gokimayathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mayath|mayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙y忙th|m忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homayath|homayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙y忙th|hom忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomayath|hohomayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙y忙th|hohom忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉mayath|n眉mayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙y忙th|n眉m忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉mayath|n眉n眉mayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙y忙th|n眉n眉m忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂mayath|n茂mayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙y忙th|n茂m忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂mayath|n茂n茂mayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙y忙th|n茂n茂m忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumayath|lumayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙y忙th|lum忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumayath|lulumayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙y忙th|lulum忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limayath|limayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙y忙th|lim忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimayath|lilimayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙y忙th|lilim忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komayath|komayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙y忙th|kom忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomayath|kokomayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙y忙th|kokom忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemayath|kemayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙y忙th|kem忙y忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemayath|kekemayath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙y忙th|kekem忙y忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
